title: Virtual Table Fan Simulator
description: An interactive, high-fidelity mechanical physics simulator modeling aerodynamic properties and angular momentum inside the browser. The platform unifies an acceleration-deceleration inertia tracker with an autonomous sweeping horizontal oscillation engine driven via continuous sub-millisecond timeline loops. To preserve absolute zero-dependency compilation compliance, the suite implements real-time audio sound wave generation modeling wind volume coefficient adjustments running natively via browser Web Audio API oscillator networks.
